name: C WorldWide Stabile Aktier KL
summary: C WorldWide Stabile Aktier KL is an open ended equity mutual fund launched by Carnegie Kapitalforvaltning AS. It is managed by C WorldWide Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. The fund invests in public equity markets of Europe. It invests in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund seeks to track the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI Europe Index. C WorldWide Stabile Aktier KL was formed on May 23, 2005 and is domiciled in Denmark.
